COMMERCIAL LEASE AGREEMENT

Date: March 1, 2025
Landlord: Downtown Realty Partners, Inc.
Tenant: Bright Cafe LLC, doing business as "The Morning Grind"

PREMISES: Suite 101, 500 Main Street, Springfield, IL 62701
Approximately 2,200 square feet of ground-floor retail space.

LEASE TERM: Five (5) years commencing April 1, 2025 through March 31, 2030.
Option to renew for two additional five-year terms with 180 days notice.

BASE RENT: $3,800.00 per month ($22.73/sq ft annually).
Annual escalation: 3% increase each anniversary date.
Triple net (NNN): Tenant pays proportional share of property taxes,
insurance, and common area maintenance (CAM) estimated at $650/month.

PERMITTED USE: Coffee shop, bakery, and light food service only.
No alcohol sales without prior written consent. Hours: 5 AM - 10 PM.

IMPROVEMENTS: Landlord provides $15,000 tenant improvement allowance.
All improvements become property of Landlord upon lease expiration.
Tenant responsible for kitchen exhaust and grease trap installation.

INSURANCE: Commercial general liability minimum $1,000,000 per occurrence.
Property insurance covering tenant improvements and inventory.
Landlord named as additional insured on all policies.

PARKING: Five (5) dedicated spaces in rear lot. Additional customer
parking in shared lot subject to availability.
